sections.paragraph:
prob. to spread out (cogn. to the verbs צָפַח, טָפַח); whence פַּח a net; also, to be made thin (like the Syr. Ethpa.); hence פַּח a thin plate.

Hiphil הֵפֵחַ (denom. from פַּח), to catch in a net, to snare, Isa 42:22, הָפֵחַ בַּחוּרִים כֻּלָּם “(one) snares (i.e. binds) them all in holes,” i.e. prisons.

[פַּחִים see פַּח .]
